description:
Azure Postgres (Flexible Server + Private Endpoint) registration data: the handles by
which a setup-created Flexible Server (with its Private Endpoint, private DNS zone, and
the Key Vault secret holding the master password) is registered as a Frozen Postgres
resource. Setup owns the server, Alien refreshes and heartbeats it. The raw password is
never carried, only the Key Vault secret URI.

host.description: Private DNS FQDN host workloads resolve to reach the server (the binding host).

keyVaultUrl.description: Key Vault base URL holding the password (e.g. `https://<vault>.vault.azure.net`).

passwordSecretName.description: Key Vault secret name of the master password (never the password).

passwordSecretUri.description:
Key Vault secret URI of the master password; the binding carries this and the
workload resolves the value at load time.

privateEndpointName.description: Private Endpoint name fronting the server in the dedicated PE subnet.

region.description: Azure region the server lives in.

resourceGroup.description: Resource group the server lives in.

serverResourceId.description: Full ARM resource id of the Flexible Server (the deletable handle).
